summary: Comprehensive backend testing completed for Rhino Drishti app's retry with exponential backoff implementation. All 76 tests passed (100% success rate). Verified rate limit configuration, batch processing with pauses, deduplication logic, and retry mechanisms are working correctly.
passed_tests: All 41 standard API endpoints functioning correctly
Rate limit configuration verified: max_articles_per_cycle=25, batch_size=3, batch_pause=5s, inter_article_delay=1.5s
/api/fetch-news triggers background news fetch with proper batching
/api/analyze-news triggers retry analysis for unprocessed items
Deduplication logic successfully skips articles already in DB (9 skipped out of 295)
Backend logs show correct batch processing: 'Processing batch 1/9 (3 articles)'
Rate limiting config properly limits to 25 articles per cycle (261 deferred)
Background scheduler correctly configured: fetch every 30 min, retry every 15 min
Unprocessed items tracking and retry mechanism working (5/10 items pending retry)
